title: rhynchosia viscida
intro: Rhynchosia viscida, also known as climbing sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and stems of the Rhynchosia viscida plant have been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Additionally, it is also used in the treatment of various health issues including coughs, colds, and respiratory problems, among others.
